requirement_topic.en: Pakistan 50 Hz Grid Profile and Commissioning Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 巴基斯坦 50 Hz 电网配置与调试证据
requirement_topic.zht: 巴基斯坦 50 Hz 電網配置與調試證據

summary.en: Pakistan is a 50 Hz grid application, but an inverter nameplate or China factory profile does not prove that the installed unit uses the approved Pakistan protection settings. The file should document nominal frequency, voltage and frequency trip windows, disconnection times, reconnection delay, ramp-rate or export-limiting controls where used, firmware profile, lock method, screenshots, and commissioning sign-off.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦属于 50 Hz 电网应用，但逆变器铭牌或中国工厂配置不能证明已安装设备采用批准的巴基斯坦保护参数。资料包应记录标称频率、电压和频率跳闸窗口、断开时间、重连延时、使用时的爬坡率或限发控制、固件配置、锁定方式、截图和调试签署。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦屬於 50 Hz 電網應用，但逆變器銘牌或中國工廠配置不能證明已安裝設備採用批准的巴基斯坦保護參數。資料包應記錄標稱頻率、電壓和頻率跳閘窗口、斷開時間、重連延時、使用時的爬坡率或限發控制、韌體配置、鎖定方式、截圖和調試簽署。

standards_or_laws: Relevant DISCO commissioning and interconnection settings

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter reports are typically based on 50 Hz operation and may include reconnect, ride-through, anti-islanding, and power-quality data. Those reports are useful capability evidence, but the Pakistan project still needs local setting confirmation and site commissioning records.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器报告通常基于 50 Hz 运行，并可能包含重连、穿越、防孤岛和电能质量数据。这些报告是有用的能力证据，但巴基斯坦项目仍需当地参数确认和现场调试记录。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器報告通常基於 50 Hz 運行，並可能包含重連、穿越、防孤島和電能品質資料。這些報告是有用的能力證據，但巴基斯坦專案仍需當地參數確認和現場調試記錄。

gap.en: Keep factory 50 Hz evidence and the Pakistan site record together: approved settings table, firmware version and region profile, password or remote-change control, anti-islanding evidence, meter or shutdown checks, reconnect test, installer declaration, and customer handover.
gap.zh: 应同时保留工厂 50 Hz 证据和巴基斯坦现场记录：批准参数表、固件版本和地区配置、密码或远程变更控制、防孤岛证据、电表或停机检查、重连测试、安装方声明和客户移交。
gap.zht: 應同時保留工廠 50 Hz 證據和巴基斯坦現場記錄：批准參數表、韌體版本和地區配置、密碼或遠端變更控制、防孤島證據、電表或停機檢查、重連測試、安裝方聲明和客戶移交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where DISCO approval, NEPRA route, project documents, or commissioning authority specifies grid settings or site evidence
mandatory_status.cn: China 50 Hz reports and profiles are supporting evidence only unless the Pakistan project accepts them after local review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat 50 Hz sameness as a starting point; Pakistan acceptance depends on the commissioned local grid profile and records.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将同为 50 Hz 视为起点；巴基斯坦接受取决于已调试的当地电网配置和记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將同為 50 Hz 視為起點；巴基斯坦接受取決於已調試的當地電網配置和記錄。
